zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lindsay於1338年之前出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，她的父親James de Lindsay10歲，母親Egidia Stewart17歲。她於1368年與John Maxwell 4th of Pollok在英國蘇格蘭斯特拉可萊德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年5月6日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾波洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lindsay于1338年之前出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，她的父亲James de Lindsay10岁，母亲Egidia Stewart17岁。她于1368年与John Maxwell 4th of Pollok在英国苏格兰斯特拉可萊德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年5月6日在苏格兰雷福福爾波洛可。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lindsay was born before 1338, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, James de Lindsay, was 10 and her mother, Egidia Stewart, was 17. She married John Maxwell 4th of Pollok in 1368, in Strathclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 May 1388, in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lindsay est née avant 1338, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, James de Lindsay, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Egidia Stewart, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Maxwell 4th of Pollok en 1368, à Strathclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1388, à Pollok, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lindsay vor 1338 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James de Lindsay 10 und ihre Mutter Egidia Stewart 17. Sie hat 1368 in Strathclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom John Maxwell 4th of Pollok geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1388 in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lindsay è nata il prima del 1338 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, James de Lindsay, aveva 10 anni e sua madre, Egidia Stewart, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Maxwell 4th of Pollok nel 1368, nel Strathclyde, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1388, nel Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lindsayが1338年以前にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父James de Lindsayは10歳，母Egidia Stewartは17歳であった。1368年にイギリススコットランドストラスクリドでJohn Maxwell 4th of Pollokと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1388年5月6日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアポロクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lindsay(이)가 1338년 이전 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James de Lindsay(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Stewart(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 스코틀랜드 스트래스클리드에서 John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 5월 6일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 폴로크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lindsay nasceu antes 1338, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, James de Lindsay, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Stewart, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maxwell 4th of Pollok em 1368, em Strathclyde, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1388, em Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lindsay родилась перед 1338 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James de Lindsay было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Stewart, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maxwell 4th of Pollok в 1368 г. в местности стратклид, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 мая 1388 г. в местности поллок, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lindsay nació antes de 1338, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, James de Lindsay, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Egidia Stewart, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Maxwell 4th of Pollok en 1368, en Strathclyde, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1388, en Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
